auth_notes: Authentication typically requires the Verisk API Gateway using OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials. Many endpoints also mandate Mutual TLS (mTLS) with client certificates and strict IP whitelisting.
rate_limits: Contract-specific; typically governed by individual Service Level Agreements (SLAs) and tier-based throttling.
gotchas: Documentation is gated behind a customer portal and not publicly accessible for open research.
Strict security requirements (IP whitelisting) may require a static IP or VPN for the n8n host.
Heavy reliance on legacy XML/SOAP formats for certain backend claim reporting functions despite RESTful wrappers.
client_must_provide: Whitelisted Static IP address of the n8n instance
ISO Company Code and User Credentials
research_notes: Implementation will require the n8n HTTP Request node. Developers must handle complex header configurations for OAuth and potentially use a custom-built Docker image or proxy if specific mTLS certificate handling is required beyond standard Node.js capabilities. Data transformation (XML to JSON) via the 'XML' node will likely be necessary.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Implementation will require the n8n HTTP Request node. Developers must handle complex header configurations for OAuth and potentially use a custom-built Docker image or proxy if specific mTLS certificate handling is required beyond standard Node.js capabilities. Data transformation (XML to JSON) via the 'XML' node will likely be necessary.
